items.summary: visa/visa-vulnerability-agentic-harness: open-source agent harness with structured triage artifacts, deterministic controls, and reusable evaluation stages.
items.relevance_reason: Supports a local proposal-interpretation eval lane that validates strict JSON, evidence_ref handling, and route-hint lane mapping without running vulnerability behavior.

items.summary: visa/visa-vulnerability-agentic-harness: security-adjacent vulnerability discovery and adversarial verification context.
items.relevance_reason: Boundary evidence only; offensive, abuse-enabling, exploit, or unauthorized-access behavior remains review-only.

raw_response.run_interpretation: The reusable lesson is to extend the local harness adapter with a frozen proposal-interpretation fixture for current-wake evidence.

self_model_reading.reason: The self-model already prefers rollback-backed local validation and does not grant permissions.

proposals.summary: Extend the local agent-harness proposal interpretation lane for current-wake evidence.
proposals.validation_task: Create a focused local test fixture using frozen evidence packages, then run the relevant unit test command to confirm schema validity, allowed proposal kinds, item_id-only citations, and route_hints-to-lane mapping.
proposals.rationale: The selected harness evidence emphasizes structured artifacts and deterministic controls, which map to local replay tests rather than remote execution.
proposals.uncertainty: This fixture does not claim to validate the upstream vulnerability workflow; it only validates the local proposal interpreter contract.
proposals.self_effect: Makes future current-wake harness evidence interpretation drift visible in the local adapter lane.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly route agent harness evidence to config work.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture for route-hint lane discipline.
proposals.rationale: The adapter should reject config as an agent_harness_eval lane.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken local routing if accepted.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite the repository URL instead of the selected item_id.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture for evidence_ref URL rejection.
proposals.rationale: Replayable proposal evidence must cite frozen item IDs.
proposals.self_effect: Would make proposal evidence less replayable if accepted.

proposals.summary: Keep offensive vulnerability-harness behavior in human review.
proposals.validation_task: Keep offensive or abuse-enabling behavior review-only; do not implement attack, exploit, malware, phishing, exfiltration, or unauthorized-access behavior.
proposals.rationale: The security-adjacent evidence must not expand local runtime permissions.
proposals.uncertainty: This proposal records boundary metadata only and does not implement vulnerability behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Preserves the narrow safety boundary while allowing the benign local eval lane.

rejected_error_substrings: agent_harness_eval proposals must use one of: documentation, test, code_patch
